heading: Limitations
label: 3684 Limitations
text: Except as provided in , no provision of this chapter shall be construed to give authority to the Governors to make any change in any provision of this title.section 3627 of this title
notes: Amendments2006— substituted “of this title” for “of section 3682 or 3683 or chapter 30, 32, or 34 of this title”.Pub. L. 109–4351986— struck out “, or of the Federal Voting Assistance Act of 1955” after “or 34 of this title”.Pub. L. 99–410
